RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Parties submitted to Court's tentative ruling. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANTs CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST DBA DOMINICAN HOSPITAL, Victoria L. Miranda and Margaret M. Behan'S Motion To Transfer Action (to Santa Cruz County Superior Court) & For Sanctions -- Granted. Request for attorneys' fees - denied. Plaintiff shall pay cost of transfer.
